hero.badge: NCR's Trusted Real Estate Developer Since 2002
hero.title: Where Dreams Find Their Address
hero.subtitle: Building lives, not just homes
hero.description: Oasis Group has delivered over 2.2 million sq. ft. of premium residential spaces across Delhi NCR — with uncompromising quality and complete transparency since 2002.

about.heading: Client-Driven. Quality-Obsessed. Transparently Delivered.
about.shortDesc: Since 2002, Oasis Group has delivered more than 2.2 Million sq. ft. of premium residential spaces. We combine innovative design with the finest materials — always on time, always within your expectations.
about.fullDesc: We at Oasis Group have always believed that what we dream is what we achieve. Since our modest but ambitious beginning in 2002, we had only one dream — to make Oasis Group one of the foremost names in real estate in Delhi NCR. After an initial foray into project management of numerous residential & commercial projects across Noida and Greater Noida, we started independent construction with Oasis Homes. Today we have delivered more than 2.2 Million sq. ft. of residential spaces and more than 2 Million sq. ft. of development is in progress.

pillars.title: Quality First
pillars.desc: Best materials, no compromise on construction standards

pillars.title: Transparency
pillars.desc: Full visibility and honesty at every stage of your journey

pillars.title: On-Time Delivery
pillars.desc: Our commitment to timelines is written into every contract

pillars.title: Green Living
pillars.desc: Sustainable, environment-conscious communities for the future

leadership.name: Sanjay Singh
leadership.title: CMD — Founder & Promoter
leadership.bio: Sanjay Singh, the founder promoter and CMD of Oasis Group, has experience of around two decades in the real estate sector. He is responsible for the overall working of the Company and instrumental in making strategic decisions pertaining to Finance, Land Allotments & Department liaison. Confidence, Focus and correct move at the right time define his persona. His strong conviction & positive energy helped the company sustain positively in the growing competitive market.

values.title: Financial Integrity
values.desc: We work with professionalism to meet all obligations — to clients, authorities, banks and vendors — with honesty and compliance with our ethical principles, creating sustainable added value.

values.title: Customer Service
values.desc: With clear focus on high-level transparency and understanding our clients' needs, we continually strive to assess and increase satisfaction while strengthening lasting bonds.

values.title: Leadership
values.desc: We influence positively, guiding team members towards their goals, encouraging personal development while fostering passion and ambition to achieve their objectives.

values.title: Commitment
values.desc: We work to the highest level of commitment and initiative to meet all obligations, embracing every challenge with the ambition of surpassing expectations.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: Continual self-improvement is an evolving feature of our strategy — staying at the forefront of high-quality construction levels in all our projects.

values.title: Sustainability
values.desc: Building communities that are not just structurally sound but environmentally conscious — creating spaces for a sustainable, flourishing future.

projects.name: Oasis Grandstand
projects.tagline: Bang on the Main Yamuna Expressway
projects.desc: Amidst the fastest emerging expanse of Delhi NCR, Oasis Grandstand Phase 1 offers premium 2 & 3 BHK residences in close vicinity to Noida International Airport and the iconic F1 Circuit.

projects.name: Oasis Venetia Heights
projects.tagline: A Perfect Address in the Heart of Greater Noida
projects.desc: A perfect address nestled in the heart of Greater Noida with limited options available. 350+ families already residing in this meticulously planned residential community.

projects.name: Oasis Homes
projects.tagline: Beauty and Functionality in Perfect Harmony
projects.desc: Homes exhibiting a perfect combination of beauty and functionality. With 130+ families already residing, Oasis Homes offers a vibrant, well-established community in Greater Noida.

projects.name: Oasis Grandstand
projects.tagline: The Next Chapter of NCR's Most Celebrated Address
projects.desc: Building on the massive success of Phase 1, Oasis Grandstand Phase 2 offers enhanced amenities and premium residences at the most strategically located address on the Yamuna Expressway.

projects.name: Oasis Arcade
projects.tagline: Premium Commercial Spaces in a Strategic Hub
projects.desc: A premium commercial development offering state-of-the-art retail and office spaces in a strategically located hub in Greater Noida — designed for modern businesses.

testimonials.name: Punendru Kumar
testimonials.text: I would like to extend my heartfelt thanks and congratulations to the Oasis team for their outstanding accomplishments. Each member has played a vital role in creating a truly wonderful space that will be our dream home. You have made the entire process smooth and enjoyable so far.

testimonials.name: Deepa Pathnayak
testimonials.text: Oasis is a fantastic builder known for its transparency and customer-friendly approach. Their team is available around the clock. For Oasis, it's not just about contracts or sales — it's about building lasting relationships. I wholeheartedly recommend Oasis to all property buyers.

testimonials.name: Raj Kumar Pandey
testimonials.text: Choosing Oasis Venetia Heights was one of the best decisions we made. From the initial booking to the final handover, the process has been seamless. The team was always responsive, transparent, and cooperative. Our home is a reflection of thoughtful design and quality construction.

testimonials.name: Sudipta Banerjee
testimonials.text: I am truly delighted to be a part of the Oasis Grandstand community. I want to sincerely thank the entire Oasis team for delivering a home that exceeds expectations. The planning, construction quality, and amenities reflect a thoughtful approach and a strong commitment to excellence.

testimonials.name: Vikas Poddar
testimonials.text: I'm extremely happy and proud to be a part of the Oasis Grandstand family. The construction quality, design, and overall layout are truly impressive. Every detail reflects thoughtful planning and a strong commitment to customer satisfaction.

testimonials.name: Aarti Garg
testimonials.text: I am truly pleased to share my experience as a proud homeowner at Oasis Grandstand YXP. The quality of construction, attention to detail, and thoughtfully designed spaces have exceeded my expectations. Oasis Grandstand YXP isn't just a project — it's a community I'm proud to be a part of.

whyInvest.title: Financial Integrity
whyInvest.desc: We meet all obligations with full transparency — from clients to government authorities — with honesty and compliance at every step.

whyInvest.title: Premium Quality
whyInvest.desc: We use the best materials available without compromising quality, delivering construction that stands the test of time.

whyInvest.title: Customer Service
whyInvest.desc: With a clear focus on high-level transparency and understanding clients' needs, we continuously strive to ensure complete satisfaction.

whyInvest.title: Timely Delivery
whyInvest.desc: Our 23-year track record of on-time delivery is your guarantee. We embrace deadlines as a personal challenge.

whyInvest.title: Innovation
whyInvest.desc: Continual self-improvement drives every project — combining innovative ideas with current market trends for exceptional outcomes.

whyInvest.title: Prime Locations
whyInvest.desc: Strategic locations near Noida Airport, Yamuna Expressway, and F1 Circuit — properties with strong appreciation potential.
